name: Keftadas with Yogurt Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 Tbsp Fresh Oregano or 1 Ts. Dried, Finely Chopped
1 Tbsp Fresh Mint or Basil, Chopped
recipeInstructions:
Kaftadas:
1. Place all ingredients except flour and oil in a large bowl.
2. Mix together with a fork.
3. Form into 1-inch balls, squeezing out excess moisture if necessary.
4. Roll meatballs in flour to coat.
5. Heat a little vegetable oil in a frying pan over medium heat.
6. Brown meatballs on all sides until they are cooked through.
7. Remove from pan and drain on paper towel. (To prepare ahead of time, slightly undercook the meatballs and refrigerate. Reheat at serving time in a 350 degree oven.)
8. Serve with toothpicks as an appetizer.
Yogurt Dip:
1. Stir all ingredients together and use as a dip for the meatballs.
2. Store in refrigerator.
